use_cases: Primary call-to-action trigger for forms and page navigation
Secondary action buttons in multi-step workflows or toolbars
Destructive action triggers with visual warning state
Ghost or link-style buttons for inline navigation within content
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars or mobile interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, small, large, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for consistent Tailwind-based styling. Includes accessibility features with focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling.
